name: product_page_2_products_blacktea

observed_strengths.observation: Benefit-led description ('Bold Flavor, Mindful Energy') with sourcing provenance (Sri Lanka and India, ethically grown) builds product credibility
'Complete Your Ritual' cross-sell section recommends complementary products (Loose Leaf Samplers, Tea Bags, Bodyguard Organic Tea)

missing_or_weak.observation: No reviews or rating shown adjacent to the buy box on a flagship product, so no social proof at the decision point
No subscribe-and-save option for a repeat-purchase consumable, missing a recurring-revenue hook

purchase_path_notes: Standard add-to-cart with Shop Pay express; AOV supported via the 'Complete Your Ritual' cross-sell row shared across PDPs.
